stemHtml: What will happen when a warm front reaches a mountain range? The air is lifted over the mountain, and will:

options.a: Increase the speed of the warm front, causing the front to be arrested on the leeward side.
options.b: Decrease in strength, so the formation of clouds will be less on the windward side.
options.c: Strengthen the formation of clouds and precipitation on the windward side.
options.d: Have increased precipitation on the leeward side of the mountain.
